Rule Text: If a person is Driving, then they must have a License.
If a customer pays with Credit Card, they must show ID.
If a passenger is Boarding, they must have a Boarding Pass.
If you enter the Construction Site, you must wear a Helmet.
If a student gets a Scholarship, they must have a High GPA.
If you use the Express Lane, you must have <10 Items.
If a person is Voting, they must be Registered.
If a nurse handles Blood, she must wear Gloves.
If a traveler enters the Country, they must have a Visa.
If a child plays Video Games, they must finish Homework.
If you park in the Handicap Spot, you must have a Permit.
If an item is imported, then Tax must be paid.
If you access the Server Room, you need a Security Badge.
If a hunter shoots a Deer, they must have a Tag.
If you sit in the Exit Row, you must be Willing to assist.
If a purchase is over $1000, it must be Approved.
If you bring a Dog, it must be on a Leash.
If a person gets the Senior Discount, they must be Over 65.
If you borrow a Book, you must have a Library Card.
If you light a Fire, you must have a Permit.
If the light is Red, the car must Stop.
If you enter the Clean Room, you must wear a Suit.
If you buy Cigarettes, you must show Proof of Age.
If a scout earns a Badge, they must complete the Task.
If you ride the Subway, you must have a Ticket.
If a student is Late, they must have a Pass.
If you adopt a Pet, you must sign a Contract.
If you withdraw Cash, you must enter a PIN.
If you go Scuba Diving, you must be Certified.
If a package is Fragile, it must have a Label.
If you claim the Warranty, you must have the Receipt.
If you enter the Pool, you must Shower first.
If a person is Drinking alcohol, they must be of Legal age.
If a person watches an Age-restricted film, they must show ID.
If you send a Letter, you must attach a Stamp.
If an employee works Extra hours, they must receive Compensation.
If a restaurant adds a Service charge, customers must be Informed.
If a worker enters a Hazardous zone, they must wear Protective gear.
If a referee blows the Whistle, the game must Pause.
If a customer uses a Loyalty card, they earn Points.
If a person is Speeding, they must pay a Fine.
If you board a Plane, you must pass Security.
If a doctor prescribes Medicine, the patient needs a Prescription.
If you enter a Courtroom, you must be Silent.
If a car is Parked illegally, it gets a Ticket.
If you enter a Museum, you must buy a Ticket.
If you sign a Contract, you must honor its Terms.
If a child is in a Car, they must wear a Seatbelt.

Rule Text: If you enter a Hospital ward, you must wash your Hands.
If a swimmer is in the Pool, they must wear a Swim cap.
If you want to Vote, you must be Registered.
If a person is Arrested, they must be read their Rights.
If you operate Heavy machinery, you must be Certified.
If a business sells Food, it must pass a Health inspection.
If you carry a Firearm, you must have a License.
If a building is Taller than 10 floors, it must have a Fire escape.
JSON Mapping: {'Tall building': 'P', 'Single floor': 'not_P', 'Has fire escape': 'Q', 'No fire escape': 'not_Q'}

Rule Text: If you collect a Pension, you must be Retired.
If a driver runs a Red light, they receive a Penalty.
If you are a Pilot, you must have a valid Medical certificate.
If a product is Recalled, it must be Removed from shelves.
If a minor is Out past curfew, they must have Parental permission.

Rule Text: If a vehicle is Unregistered, it cannot be Driven legally.
If you handle Food professionally, you must wear Gloves.
If a tenant breaks the Lease, they forfeit the Deposit.
If you enter a Country illegally, you can be Deported.

Rule Text: If a patient is Unconscious, doctors must obtain Emergency consent.
If you take a Taxi, you must pay the Fare.
If a student is Caught cheating, they receive a Failing grade.
If an animal bites someone, it must be Quarantined.
If you park in a No-parking zone, your car gets Towed.
If a lawyer represents you, they must keep information Confidential.
If you cross the Border, your Passport is checked.
If you file Taxes late, you pay a Penalty.
If a restaurant receives a Health violation, it must Close temporarily.
If you use a Crosswalk, cars must Yield.
If you receive a Subpoena, you must appear in Court.
If a food product Expires, it must be Discarded.
If you take someone else's Property, you can be charged with Theft.
If a vehicle passes the Emissions test, it gets a Sticker.
If you enter a Gated community, you must be Buzzed in.
If a child is Homeschooled, parents must file with the State.
If you are Summoned for jury duty, you must Attend.
If a food handler is Sick, they must not work with Food.

Rule Text: If you donate Blood, you must meet Health requirements.
If a building is Condemned, people must Evacuate.
If you drive a Motorcycle, you must wear a Helmet.
If a pharmacist dispenses a Drug, they must verify the Prescription.
If a patient is Discharged, a doctor must sign the Release.
If you use a Company car for Personal use, you must declare it.
If an inspector finds a Safety violation, work must Stop.
If you witness an Accident, you must report it to Authorities.

Rule Text: If a gun is Stored at home, it must be in a Locked safe.
If you are Under oath, you must tell the Truth.
If a business Closes permanently, it must notify its Employees.
If a hotel guest Checks out late, they pay an Extra fee.
If you apply for a Loan, the bank checks your Credit score.
If a surgeon performs an Operation, they must be Licensed.
If you enter a Laboratory, you must wear Safety goggles.
If a ship enters a Port, it must be Inspected.
If a contractor finishes the Job, the client must Pay.
